subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaid of God, if thy kindred have turned away from thee, praise be unto God, for thou art the recipient of thy Lord's favours [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز حق اگر خویشان از تو بیزار شدند الحمد لله مظهر الطاف پروردگاری و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
